tool_args.label: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard Q52/Q53 Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: Woodhaven / Cross Bay Boulevard Q52/Q53 Select Bus Service
payload.description: Phased SBS project along Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards bringing high-quality transit service, bus lanes, median bus stations, off-board fare collection, TSP, and pedestrian safety improvements.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Proposed designs for Q52/53 Select Bus Service

payload.description: SBS customers pay their fare at machines located at SBS stops before boarding, reducing the time to pick up and drop off passengers.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Off-board fare collection: SBS customers pay their fare at machines located at SBS stops before boarding

tool_args.label: Bus lanes on Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards

payload.description: Bus lanes along Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards bring faster and more reliable service to more than 30,000 daily bus riders.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus lanes: Bus lanes along Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards bring faster and more reliable service to more than 30,000 daily bus riders.

tool_args.label: Median bus stations on Woodhaven Blvd

payload.description: Bus stops along 1.3 miles of Woodhaven Blvd where service roads now exist will be a better place to wait for the bus with added amenities such as real time passenger information, public art, and seating.
payload.location_text: Woodhaven Blvd between Park Lane South and Rockaway Blvd

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven Blvd between Park Lane South and Rockaway Blvd

evidence_refs.source_quote: Median bus stations: Bus stops along 1.3 miles of Woodhaven Blvd where service roads now exist
Median stations on Woodhaven Blvd where service roads already exist (Park Lane South to Rockaway Blvd)

payload.description: Q52/Q53 SBS buses will have TSP technology, which improves bus and general travel times by holding a green light longer or shortening a red light faster when a bus is approaching.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Transit Signal Priority (TSP): Q52/Q53 SBS buses will have TSP technology

payload.description: New medians, pedestrian waiting areas, and crosswalks improve the safety and comfort of pedestrians and bus riders along the corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pedestrian safety enhancements: New medians, pedestrian waiting areas, and crosswalks

payload.description: Portions of Woodhaven and Cross Bay Blvd will be resurfaced to provide a smoother ride for bus riders and drivers alike.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Street resurfacing & markings: Portions of Woodhaven and Cross Bay Blvd will be resurfaced

payload.description: Expanded medians and pedestrian improvements provide for extra pedestrian comfort and safety while allowing opportunities for plantings along the corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Medians and plantings: expanded medians and pedestrian improvements provide for extra pedestrian comfort and safety

tool_args.label: Bus bulbs on Cross Bay Blvd

payload.description: Expanding the sidewalk to meet the bus at a bus stop provides more room for bus riders to wait and allow buses to travel in and out of the stop without pulling over.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus Bulbs on Cross Bay Blvd: Expanding the sidewalk to meet the bus at a bus stop

payload.claim_text: Woodhaven Blvd at Jamaica Ave is a Vision Zero Priority Intersection. DOT redesigned the plans to include enhanced pedestrian crossings and relocated left-turn bays to preserve access while addressing vehicle safety issues.

location_normalized.raw_text: Woodhaven Blvd at Jamaica Ave, Woodhaven, Queens

evidence_refs.source_quote: Woodhaven Blvd at Jamaica Ave is a Vision Zero Priority Intersection and a major transportation hub for Woodhaven, Queens.
DOT redesigned the plans for the intersection to include enhanced pedestrian crossings to improve pedestrian safety and relocated left-turn bays to preserve access to Jamaica Ave

payload.description: Existing offset bus lanes on Woodhaven Blvd between Eliot Ave and Metropolitan Ave will remain. New bus lanes on Woodhaven/Cross Bay Blvd between Union Tpke and Belt Pkwy. No bus lanes on Cross Bay Blvd south of Belt Pkwy in Howard Beach.
